goals.title: Fix ITNA homepage live browser so primary buttons are brown design-to...
goals.objective: Fix ITNA homepage live browser so primary buttons are brown design-token buttons and the Spline hero characters render instead of a blank dark canvas. Success criteria: C1 live http://127.0.0.1:3000/ at 2048x1138 shows non-blue primary button styles and brown CTA colors; C2 live http://127.0.0.1:3000/ at 2048x1138 renders Spline characters in the hero, not only the dark background. Browser evidence screenshots required.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Fix ITNA homepage live browser so primary buttons are brown design-token butt...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Browser Playwright 2048x1138 http://127.0.0.1:3000/?ulw=green screenshot /tmp/itna-ulw-evidence/green-clean-2048x1138.png; computed .btn-primary background rgb(95, 75, 50), buttonIsBlue=false; browser closed; dev server PID 74003 intentionally retained for user QA at 127.0.0.1:3000
successCriteria.notes: Live page serves brown design-token CTA, not stale blue.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Fix ITNA homepage live browser so primary buttons are brown design-token butt....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Browser Playwright 2048x1138 http://127.0.0.1:3000/?ulw=green screenshot /tmp/itna-ulw-evidence/green-clean-2048x1138.png; Spline iframe src https://my.spline.design/googlyeyes-pZmDXlBzedodrTTE2B4kOtSd-iwy/?itna=20260630; hero screenshot visibly contains Spline characters; browser closed; dev server PID 74003 intentionally retained for user QA at 127.0.0.1:3000
successCriteria.notes: Spline frame cache-busted and renders characters, not blank dark canvas.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Fix ITNA homepage live browser so primary buttons are brown design-token butt....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression checks: eslint exit 0; tsc --noEmit exit 0; vitest run --passWithNoTests exit 0 with 1 test file and 3 tests passed; dev server PID 74003 still serving 127.0.0.1:3000 for user QA.
successCriteria.notes: Adjacent UI/card changes remain type-safe and test suite passes.

goals.evidence: All criteria pass. Browser evidence: /tmp/itna-ulw-evidence/green-clean-2048x1138.png shows brown CTA and visible Spline characters. Diagnostics: eslint, tsc --noEmit, vitest all passed. Dev server intentionally retained for user QA at http://127.0.0.1:3000 PID 74003.
